title: user — realtime broadcasts
description: The user module does NOT broadcast on realtime channels directly. User + Profile + TenantMember mutations fire domain events (see `events.json`) which downstream modules (notifications, activity) may republish over their own broadcast channels — but this module ships zero channels of its own. Broadcast surfaces belong to the domain that owns the read side (notifications inbox, activity feed), not the write side.
notes: If the SPA needs live updates when a User is added to a Tenant, it subscribes to `tenant.{id}.membership_changes` — that channel is owned by the tenancy module, not this one.
If a User sees their own /me update in real time, it subscribes to `user.{id}.self_changes` — owned by the notifications module's in-app channel.
